query: SELECT id, companyName, customerCode FROM companies WHERE companyName LIKE '%测试%' OR companyName LIKE '%test%' OR companyName LIKE '%Test%' OR companyName LIKE '%DEBUG%' OR companyName LIKE '%Debug%' OR companyName = 'djf' ORDER BY id;
